coachAM: Your journal entries reveal a consistent pattern: a strong desire for "discipline and efficiency" and to "be the best worker," yet your sleep and training protocols, the foundational pillars of physical and mental resilience, are collapsing. This disconnect between aspiration and execution, particularly in areas demanding sustained effort and self-regulation, directly correlates with your low completion rates in the very habits that fuel peak performance, indicating a critical breakdown in consistent self-governance. The root cause is a fundamental failure to prioritize and protect the physical disciplines that underpin all other high-level output, leading to a perpetual state of energetic deficit that undermines your ability to consistently execute on your ambitious goals and compromises your long-term trajectory as an elite founder. Today, immediately block out 9:30 PM on your calendar as "Lights Out: Non-Negotiable" and set a recurring alarm to enforce it.
